r centralized file storage. Calendar and Room Scheduling A shared calendar service is available to facilitate arranging meetings. This service is also used to schedule conference rooms. E-mail yournamehere@eecs.berkeley.edu EECS Login Servers We offe

S Slack Workspace . File Storage We offer centralized file storage, including home directories and project space. Infrastructure A variety of computing infrastructure services such as directory , time synchronization , and DHCP are provided. Instruct

synchronization , and DHCP are provided. Instructional Support Computing support for all your instructional course needs. MacOS Support for the MacOS X operating system. Mailing Lists Create your own mailing lists or manage your subscriptions to Dep

mailing lists or manage your subscriptions to Department lists. Network We maintain state-of-the-art networking facilities, including complete wireless coverage. Printing How to print documents via the central print server. Security Guidelines and s

he central print server. Security Guidelines and suggestions, as well as departmental and campus policies. Software We maintain a variety of commercial software for multiple platforms. System Administration All computers in EECS should be professiona

ration All computers in EECS should be professionally administered. If yours isn’t, we’ve got you covered. Unix We support the most recent versions of Red Hat/CentOS Linux. Web Personal hompages , virtual hosting , SSL Certificates , and more. Window

tual hosting , SSL Certificates , and more. Windows We maintain a large and comprehensive Windows Active Directory environment, which is tightly integrated with our Unix environment. Additional Information RATES Our recharge rates, updated annually.
